body.title: [akien] weather.html — point to isolated network CSV endpoint
body.intention: I intend that the weather.html dashboard displays live data from the isolated AcuRite daemon.
body.description:
weather.html currently fetches ./weather.csv (file:// URL). With isolated daemon, CSV is still at /home/akien/AcuRite/weather.csv on laptop. If weather.html is served via HTTP (e.g., from a simple file server on port 8000), it can fetch the CSV via HTTP. Alternatively, if weather.html is still accessed via file://, symlink or copy the CSV to the same directory as weather.html so relative path ./weather.csv works. Choose the simpler approach and update weather.html fetch URL if needed.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/acurite-free/weather.html, /home/akien/AcuRite/weather.csv (symlink or HTTP endpoint)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Integration only; daemon and dashboard code already exist
**Completion criteria:** (1) weather.html can fetch and parse the isolated daemon's CSV; (2) Dashboard displays sensor data in real-time; (3) Data updates every 60s as per auto-refresh; (4) Both file:// access (symlink) and HTTP access (optional) work
**Test plan:** (1) Run isolated daemon; (2) Open weather.html in browser; (3) Verify sensor cards render with live data; (4) Check that new CSV rows appear within 60s refresh cycle; (5) Verify outdoor sensors show wind/pressure/UV, indoor show temp/humidity
